_comment: Canonical pool manifest for all Adrena offchain services (MrOracle, MrSablier, MrSablierStaking, MrAutonom, adrena-data/*). Every consumer pins this file via @adrena/abi (TS) or adrena-abi (Rust) and reads it at startup. Pool addresses, custody pubkeys, and lp mint are populated post-deploy; before deploy the pubkey slots are empty strings. When pools are added/removed or pool feed IDs change, bump this file here, regenerate configs/artifact_manifest.json, push a new adrena-abi commit, and bump the pin in every consumer repo. Consumers accept --manifest-path as a runtime override for ops flexibility; the embedded default is the source of truth otherwise.

pools.name: commodities-pool
pools._feedIds_comment: release/39 canonical. Autonom range: 30-35 crypto (SOL/jitoSOL/BTC/WBTC/BONK/USDC, unsessioned), 36 XAU (sessioned launch commodity). USDC at 35 is listed because the pool's USDC stable custody needs pricing for AUM; MrAutonom's sessioned-only filter drops it from market-hours requests automatically. Future commodities append at 37+ in lockstep with configs/oracles/autonom.mainnet.json and feed_metadata.sessioned.
